hero.title:
Project Execution Firm
for Structural Initiatives
hero.subtitle: We structure, finance and execute projects that sustainably transform Africa.

clients.title: We support key players in Africa's transformation

gov.title: Governments & Ministries
gov.desc: Supporting the design, structuring and execution of public policies and sovereign projects.

institutions.title: Institutions & Donors
institutions.desc: Partnering with international organizations for the assessment and monitoring of financed projects.

private.title: Companies & Private Groups
private.desc: Accompanying private investors in their establishment and expansion across the continent.

ngo.title: NGOs & International Organizations
ngo.desc: Structuring development aid programs to maximize on-the-ground impact.

funds.title: Funds & Investors
funds.desc: Mobilizing and structuring financing for projects with high social and economic returns.

startups.title: Startups & Innovation
startups.desc: Accompanying African entrepreneurs in their scale-up and institutional fundraising.

pillars.title:
We change the narrative
by moving to execution
pillars.subtitle: GIRA doesn't just advise. We execute.

1.title: Change the narrative and paradigm
1.desc: From aid to investment. From discourse to action. GIRA carries a radically different vision of African development.

2.title: Rethink project governance
2.desc: Robust governance structures, effective steering committees and rigorous accountability.

3.title: Redefine management & leadership
3.desc: Training and positioning African talent at the heart of strategic and operational decisions.

4.title: Drive long-term transformation
4.desc: A long-term commitment. Measurable results. Continuous field presence to guarantee impact.

sectors.title:
Targeted expertise,
in service of concrete projects
sectors.subtitle: Each sector requires deep knowledge. Our sector experts intervene with precision.

pnd.title: GIRA at the heart of the National Development Plan
pnd.desc: Strategic partner of the Central African Republic, GIRA accompanies the implementation of the NDP 2024-2028 and the preparation of the Casablanca Investor Roundtable.

cta.title: Do you have a strategic project to bring to life?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk. GIRA places a team of experts at your disposal, ready to transform your vision into reality.

hero.title: About GIRA
hero.subtitle: A project execution firm focused on lasting impact in Africa

mission.title: Our mission
mission.subtitle: GIRA was born from a simple observation: Africa doesn't lack projects or funding, but execution.
points: Structure projects to make them financeable and executable
Ensure delegated project management through to delivery

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Creative solutions adapted to African realities
